title: Create: Overbalanced
description: A recipe datapack that makes more automation possible! With semi-complex, fun, and well thought recipes.
body:
**Are you tired of those recipe datapacks that seem a little to easy?**
>  "Why can I turn one coal into a diamond?"

>  "This makes mining obsolete! Even in the early game?!"

**Or maybe you're like me and LOVE factory gauges and just wanna make a big ol' recipe tree!**

## Introducing "Create: Overballanced"

All recipes are designed to be fun, ballanced, and complex... but **NOT grindy**.

### Recipes included:
- Calcite
- Magama blocks
- Tuff
- Asurine
- Crimsite
- Ochrum
- Veridium
- Netherrack

(view gallery for recipes)

### With these recipes you can now automate:
- Blaze cakes
- Brass (copper and zinc)
- Redstone
- Gunpowder
    ...aaannd much much more!

Updates adding recipes for deepslate, lapis, and possably re-add Refined Radiance and Shadow Steel ;D
